steps.title: Identify profit equation structure
steps.content:
Profit = Revenue - Fixed Cost.
$$15000 = 2.00x - 4500$$ shows profit (15000) equals 2.00x minus 4500, so 2.00x is the revenue.

steps.title: Interpret the term 2.00x
steps.content:
Since revenue equals price per dispenser times number sold, the coefficient 2.00 has units dollars per dispenser. Therefore $$2.00x$$ is the monthly sales revenue from selling $$x$$ tape dispensers.
That matches choice A - A is correct.
